subcodes.first_line: O companions of the Ark! Hearken unto the Call of God, the Lord of creation. Verily, He summoneth you unto Himself and guideth you unto His path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اصحاب السفینه اسمعوا ندآء الله مولی البریه انه یدعوکم الیه و یهدیکم الی صراطه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
